case_title: CHASE BANK USA , N.A. VS. TONI S MESEC et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA , N.A.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA , N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MESEC, TONI S $2,036.86 PRINCIPAL, $33.48 INTEREST, $268.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,338.34, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA , N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT MESEC, TONI S DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-08-2010
DECLARATION RE: WAIVER OF ATTORNEY'S FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA , N.A.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $268.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT MESEC, TONI S
